    namespace query_product_sales_report {

    struct Product {
      sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;

      int product_id;
      int quantity;

    struct CategoryReport {
      std::string category;
      int total_qty;
      double total_amt;

      std::string category;
      int total_qty;

    };

    std::vector<CategoryReport> query_product_sales_report() {

        auto query = select_from<Product, "p">("category"_t1, sum("quantity"_t2).as<"total_qty">, sum("amount"_t2).as<"total_amt">)
            | inner_join<Sale, "s">("product_id"_t1 == "product_id"_t2)
            | group_by("category"_t1)
            | to<std::vector<CategoryReport>>;

        return query(conn).value();
    }

    }  // namespace query_product_sales_report
